formulas.name: fRoleRemovalAlertHtml
formulas.expression: 'ALERT: role(s) removed because ' & {!accountContactRelationRecord.Contact.Name} & ' has no email address: ' & SUBSTITUTE(LEFT({!vRoleRemovalMessage}, LEN({!vRoleRemovalMessage}) - 1), ';', ', ') & '.'

recordLookups.name: dgr_01_AccountContactRelation
recordLookups.label: 1. Account Contact Relation (Checking)
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND ((3 AND 4) OR (5 AND 6) OR (7 AND 8) OR (9 AND 10) OR (11 AND 12) OR (13 AND 14))
